titles.en: Amīr al-mu’minīn on az-Zubayr's allegiance and his son's betrayal
Amīr al-mu’minīn on az-Zubayr's allegiance and his son's betrayal

segments: ٤٥٣. وَقَالَ (عليه ‏السلام): مَا زَالَ الزُّبَيْرُ رَجُلاً مِنَّا أَهْلَ الْبَيْتِ حَتَّى نَشَأَ ابْنُهُ الْمَشْؤُومُ عَبْدُ اللهِ.
arabic.text: ٤٥٣. وَقَالَ (عليه ‏السلام): مَا زَالَ الزُّبَيْرُ رَجُلاً مِنَّا أَهْلَ الْبَيْتِ حَتَّى نَشَأَ ابْنُهُ الْمَشْؤُومُ عَبْدُ اللهِ.

segments: 453. Amīr al-mu’minīn, peace be upon him, said: az-Zubayr remained a man from our house till his wretched son ‘Abdullāh came forth. [1]
en.sayed-ali-raza.text: 453. Amīr al-mu’minīn, peace be upon him, said: az-Zubayr remained a man from our house till his wretched son ‘Abdullāh came forth. [1]
